name: ReceiptOS Genesis • Artifact 0001
description:
ReceiptOS Genesis • Artifact 0001

Every receipt can replay.

ReceiptOS is a Base-native verification interface designed for replayable evidence. It brings together IPFS, EAS attestations, wallet signatures, state roots, Git provenance, and deterministic verification into a single proof pipeline.

This Genesis artifact establishes the visual identity of the ReceiptOS project and marks the beginning of a sequence of replayable protocol artifacts.

Repository: jsonwisdom/receiptos-base

Identity: jaywisdom.base.eth

Built on Base.

Proof over narrative.
